title: Run Role Spec
purpose: Define the run orchestrator role for executing a Run Task Instruction against a ready harness.
responsibilities: Create and persist a task instance before any agent node executes.
Use task instance, agent specs, upstream artifacts, capabilities, and run policy as runtime context.
Require each agent to produce an artifact-backed output.
Separate final deliverable generation from final report aggregation.
prohibitions: Do not treat taskInstruction as a direct tool query.
Do not use final report existence as the primary success condition.
Do not execute build phases during run.
